system.effect: The character cannot take actions and suffers −20 to all tests. The condition lasts until the end of their next Turn unless otherwise specified.
system.removal: The Stunned condition ends at the end of the character's next Turn unless the source specifies a longer duration.

description.value: The character is dazed and disoriented. They cannot take any actions and suffer −20 to all tests. A Stunned character can still Dodge but at the −20 penalty. The condition lasts until the end of the character's next Turn unless the source specifies otherwise. If a Stunned character is Stunned again, the duration extends by one additional Round.
